milestones.title: Phase 1 - World/Persona Modeling
milestones.description: Produce a stable, evidence-backed world model and persona layer for the Fog Harbor demo.

milestones.title: Phase 2 - Scenario/Simulation Loop
milestones.description: Stabilize baseline/intervention simulation, trace, report, and eval loops.

milestones.title: Phase 3 - Eval/UI/Demo
milestones.description: Finish the workbench, final demo loop, and review-grade presentation layer.

milestones.title: Phase 4 - Review Workflow and Ops Hardening
milestones.description: Restart the GitHub execution queue, harden successor-phase automation, and upgrade the workbench into a review workflow without expanding core simulation/report contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 5 - Review Sign-off and Evidence Packaging
milestones.description: Turn the Phase 4 review workflow into a usable sign-off flow, package review output for handoff, and remove repeated successor-queue bootstrap friction without expanding simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 6 - Automation Activation and Queue Hygiene
milestones.description: Resume the long-running loop by activating local Codex queue automation on top of the worktree runbook, syncing repo truth to the new queue, and cleaning historical branch noise without changing simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 7 - Operator Handoff and Review Delivery
milestones.description: Turn the resumed queue into a reviewer-to-operator handoff loop by adding GitHub-ready delivery surfaces in the workbench without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 8 - Closeout Delivery and Pickup Routing
milestones.description: Turn the new operator handoff surfaces into exit-gate-ready closeout packets and lane-aware pickup guidance without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 9 - Review Delivery Polish and Completeness
milestones.description: Consolidate the growing workbench delivery surfaces by mapping each export to its GitHub or operator destination and surfacing completion gaps without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 10 - Guided Delivery and Quick Export
milestones.description: Turn the growing set of workbench delivery surfaces into a more guided, lower-friction operator flow with destination-aware recommendations and quick export actions, without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 11 - Export Presets and Delivery Shortcuts
milestones.description: Reduce operator decision friction by adding export presets, delivery shortcuts, and clearer guided handoff entry points without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 12 - Delivery Preset Refinement and Comparison Flow
milestones.description: Refine the new delivery presets and shortcut surfaces with clearer comparison and context carry-forward, without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 13 - Guided Export Payload Review
milestones.description: Refine the guided export surfaces by making payload differences and destination tradeoffs easier to review without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 14 - Export Delta and Copy Confidence
milestones.description: Turn guided export selection into a higher-confidence handoff step by surfacing export deltas and destination-specific copy preflight cues without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 15 - Override Rationale and Delivery Confidence
milestones.description: Turn guided export selection into a clearer operator commitment step by surfacing override rationale and copy-sidecar handoff context without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 16 - Export Bundle Composition and Handoff Packaging
milestones.description: Turn the guided export choice into a clearer final handoff package by composing export companions and destination-specific attachment order without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 17 - Final Bundle Delivery and Handoff Manifest
milestones.description: Turn the Phase 16 handoff package preview into a final, low-friction delivery step by adding recipient-facing cover context and one-step bundle copy surfaces without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 18 - Bundle Variants and Receiver Guidance
milestones.description: Turn the Phase 17 final bundle into a more receiver-specific delivery artifact by adding compact/full bundle variants and explicit receiver follow-through cues without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 19 - Receiver Roles and Follow-Through Routing
milestones.description: Turn the Phase 18 receiver-guidance bundle into a more role-aware handoff surface by tailoring guidance for reviewer, approver, and operator pickups without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 20 - Role-Specific Bundle Layout and Decision Templates
milestones.description: Turn the Phase 19 role-aware routing bundle into clearer role-specific packet layouts and decision-ready response templates without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 21 - Role Presets and Response Packaging
milestones.description: Turn the Phase 20 role-aware bundle layouts and decision templates into faster role presets and response packaging flows without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 22 - Preset Workflow and Packed Responses
milestones.description: Turn the Phase 21 role presets and response shortcuts into smoother preset workflows and grouped response packs without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 23 - Preset Sessions and Response Kits
milestones.description: Turn the Phase 22 preset workflow into a more repeatable handoff session by surfacing active preset summaries and route-filtered response kits without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

milestones.title: Phase 24 - Session Handoff and Route Comparison
milestones.description: Turn the preset session strip and route-filtered response kits into clearer send-ready handoff surfaces by comparing alternate routes and packaging the active session for downstream delivery without changing core simulation or artifact contracts.

issues.title: Day 0 bootstrap: create a clean automation baseline
issues.milestone: Phase 1 - World/Persona Modeling
issues.body:
## goal
Create the clean baseline required before long-running automation can write code or auto-merge.

## input
- Current repository baseline state
- Existing Phase 0/Phase 1 repo state
- Automation plan in docs/plans/automation-roadmap.md

## output
- A clean baseline snapshot or baseline PR
- Confirmed milestones and label taxonomy
- CI upgraded from phase0-only checks to long-running automation gates

## out-of-scope
- Building new product features
- Expanding the simulation contract

## minimal test
- `git -c safe.directory=D:/mirror status --short`
- `./make.ps1 test`
- `./make.ps1 eval-demo`

## touches contract
Yes. This work changes automation governance and merge policy.

## phase
Phase 1 bootstrap gate
